title: Clarinet Bare-Bones Starter Packet
artifact_focus: L1 starter packet for acoustic-law declaration, measurement intake, authority gates, and later CAD/DXF promotion.

required_before_public: Measured bore ID, station datum, and tolerance evidence are required before body geometry can become authoritative.
Measured or reviewed tone-hole center, diameter, chimney, undercut, and closure rows are required before any drilling layout or DXF authority.
Reed and mouthpiece setup records, leak checks, pitch table, and response notes are required before acoustic iteration claims.
Reviewed CAD/DXF/design-table authority must be recorded in visual-output-register.csv before fabrication claims.
Wolfram output remains source-only analysis support until run results cite measured inputs and are reviewed.
The existing image is reference-only and must not be used as dimensional evidence.

sources.title: Design basis
sources.credit: L1 single-reed closed-open acoustic-law declaration and authority boundary.

sources.title: Measurement authority plan
sources.credit: Bore, tone-hole, reed/mouthpiece, leak, pitch, and CAD/DXF evidence gates.

sources.title: Visual authority register
sources.credit: Reference image is recorded as non-dimensional and reference-only.

notes: This manifest indexes the current L1 packet and does not promote the repo to L2 or build-ready status.
All dimensions remain TBD, assumption, or requires measurement until measured templates, reviewed design tables, CAD, or DXF artifacts are added.
No measured prototype data, runtime Wolfram validation, reviewed CAD/DXF, or physical validation evidence exists yet.
